india_trends.title: Amul raises milk prices by ₹2 per litre; new rates effective May 14
india_trends.summary: Amul milk prices are set to rise by ₹2 per litre. This price hike will affect several popular milk variants. The new rates will be effective from May 14. Consumers across markets will experience the impact. This increase adds to existing household budget pressures.

india_trends.title: Niti Aayog to strengthen model concession agreement framework for multi-modal logistics parks
india_trends.summary: Niti Aayog is actively working on improving frameworks for major infrastructure projects. This includes updating agreements for multi-modal logistics parks to boost their viability. The think tank is also involved in redeveloping railway stations in Vijayawada and creating a public-private partnersh

india_trends.title: Kaynes Technology Q4 Results: Profit falls 22% YoY to Rs 91 crore; revenue jumps 26%
india_trends.summary: Kaynes Technology posted robust quarterly revenue growth driven by strong electronics manufacturing demand and expanding execution across sectors. india_trends.title: Sebi proposes overhaul of municipal bond rules to deepen urban infrastructure financing market
india_trends.summary: Key changes proposed include pooled bond issuances, stricter disclosure norms, and incentives for retail investors, aimed at addressing infrastructure funding needs amid rapid urbanization.

india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea and 4 other midcap stocks hit 52-week highs, rally up to 40% in a month
india_trends.summary: Benchmark indices ended marginally higher as five BSE 150 Midcap stocks touched fresh 52-week highs, reflecting strong investor sentiment and bullish momentum. Vodafone Idea, SAIL, MCX, Laurus Labs and Ajanta Pharma recorded notable monthly gains, signalling sustained buying interest despite subdued

Asia Healthcare Holdings appoints three new independent directors
india_trends.summary: Asia Healthcare Holdings has appointed three independent directors to its board, effective May 1, 2026. Murali Sivaraman will serve as board chairperson. Vinita Bali joins as Nomination and Remuneration Committee chairperson. Rashmi Joshi takes on the role of audit committee chairperson. AHH operate

india_trends.title: Clean Max Enviro Energy shares surge 7% after strong Q4 earnings; up 70% in under 2 months
india_trends.summary: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions shares rose 7% to ₹1,309 after strong March quarter results, with 25% revenue growth. Net profit surged 165% to ₹45.4 crore, driven by renewable energy sales, especially from the data and AI segment, which now contributes 42% to its portfolio.

india_trends.title: Tata Motors posts stellar Q4 results: Should you buy this Tata group stock after earnings?
india_trends.summary: The demerged Tata Motors arm, on 13 May, posted a massive 69.56% year-on-year (YoY) jump in its standalone profit to ₹2,406 crore for Q4FY26. The profit stood at ₹1,419 crore in the same period last year.

india_trends.title: Jio Financial and Allianz Group formally launch 50:50 insurance JV
india_trends.summary: Jio Allianz General Insurance has been incorporated. Jio Financial Services and Germany's Allianz each hold a 50 percent stake. The new company will offer general insurance, including health insurance in India. This follows Allianz's earlier exit from a joint venture with Bajaj Finserv. The incorpor

india_trends.title: Gold financier stocks jump after the government hikes import duty on precious metals
india_trends.summary: The recent hike in import duties on gold and silver to 15% has led to a significant surge in gold financier stocks. This increase is driven by rising gold prices, enhancing loan collateral values and boosting demand for gold-backed loans. Explore how this affects the market landscape.

india_trends.title: Uncertainty scars J&K’s economy and impacts banking, but resilience here is remarkable: Amitava Chatterjee, J&K Bank
india_trends.summary: Jammu and Kashmir Bank has recorded its highest profit to date, soaring to Rs 2363.47 crore in FY-26. This achievement marks a significant recovery from past hardships, says bank chief Amitava Chatterjee.

india_trends.title: Sebi weighs wider net for intraday borrowing by mutual funds
india_trends.summary: Sebi said restricting borrowing only to redemption payouts and guaranteed receivables could impair fund management flexibility and potentially hurt scheme returns.

Zydus Lifesciences close to buying US oncology drug maker for $100 to 150 million: Sources
india_trends.summary: Indian drug maker Zydus Lifesciences is close to acquiring a US company. The deal is expected to be between $100 to $150 million. This acquisition will help Zydus build its own distribution network for anti-cancer drugs in the US. The target company also has its own pipeline of biologic drugs. A dea

india_trends.title: Gainers & Losers: Hindustan Zinc, MTAR Tech among 8 big movers on Wednesday
india_trends.summary: Domestic equity markets snapped a four-session losing streak with marginal gains on Wednesday. Hindustan Zinc, Vodafone Idea, Dixon Technologies and Texmaco Rail rallied sharply.

india_trends.title: Mumbai’s eastern corridor gains traction as firms expand beyond BKC
india_trends.summary: Mumbai's commercial landscape is shifting from traditional hubs like BKC and Nariman Point to emerging micro-markets such as Chembur, driven by escalating costs. india_trends.title: Anant Raj to evaluate demerger of data center business, appoints Anish Sarin as director
india_trends.summary: Anant Raj Ltd is exploring a demerger for its data center business. A committee has been formed to evaluate the move. The company has also appointed Anish Sarin as a Director. Anant Raj Ltd has reported significant financial growth and a strengthened balance sheet.

world_trends.title: Von Borstel Buys $7.5 Million More of This Global Bond ETF -- Is It Worth a Look?
Semiconductor names have never before held this much sway over the stock market. History shows that could be a problem.
world_trends.summary: Semiconductor stocks have become an unusually large force in the U.S. stock market, underscoring how much of the latest rally in indexes like the S&P 500 has been powered by the artificial-intelligence trade.
